map.message: $(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered an internal error.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered an error while defer processing.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered a bus interface error.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered a CXL bus interface error.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not create device handle.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not read the device's identify information.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not create device GUID.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not create the device's symbolic link.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not enable the device interface.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not get the device's PCIe Dvsec0 information.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not get the device's register locator information.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not get the device's PCI configuration information.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not get the device's resource list information.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered an error while initializing the device registers.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not get the device's status register.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered an error while making the mailbox interface ready.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered an error while initializing the mailbox registers.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered an error while querying the mailbox capabilities.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered an error while initializing the HDM registers.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered a multi-tier memory bus interface error.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered an error while connecting the interrupts.)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not read the device's identify information (phase 2).)
$(string.map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not create the location string.)

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered an internal error.
string.value: The driver encountered an internal error.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered an error while defer processing.
string.value: The driver encountered an error while defer processing.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered a bus interface error.
string.value: The driver encountered a bus interface error.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered a CXL bus interface error.
string.value: The driver encountered a CXL bus interface error.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not create device handle.
string.value: The driver could not create device handle.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not read the device's identify information.
string.value: The driver could not read the device's identify information.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not create device GUID.
string.value: The driver could not create device GUID.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not create the device's symbolic link.
string.value: The driver could not create the device's symbolic link.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not enable the device interface.
string.value: The driver could not enable the device interface.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not get the device's PCIe Dvsec0 information.
string.value: The driver could not get the device's PCIe Dvsec0 information.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not get the device's register locator information.
string.value: The driver could not get the device's register locator information.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not get the device's PCI configuration information.
string.value: The driver could not get the device's PCI configuration information.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not get the device's resource list information.
string.value: The driver could not get the device's resource list information.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered an error while initializing the device registers.
string.value: The driver encountered an error while initializing the device registers.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not get the device's status register.
string.value: The driver could not get the device's status register.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered an error while making the mailbox interface ready.
string.value: The driver encountered an error while making the mailbox interface ready.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered an error while initializing the mailbox registers.
string.value: The driver encountered an error while initializing the mailbox registers.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered an error while querying the mailbox capabilities.
string.value: The driver encountered an error while querying the mailbox capabilities.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered an error while initializing the HDM registers.
string.value: The driver encountered an error while initializing the HDM registers.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered a multi-tier memory bus interface error.
string.value: The driver encountered a multi-tier memory bus interface error.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver encountered an error while connecting the interrupts.
string.value: The driver encountered an error while connecting the interrupts.

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not read the device's identify information (phase 2).
string.value: The driver could not read the device's identify information (phase 2).

string.id: map_StartDeviceFailureThe driver could not create the location string.
string.value: The driver could not create the location string.
